proposal_text:
Title: Urban Canvas
Concept: Paint Your World, Resonate Together.
Website Product Description: Imagine a modern city where every choice you make leaves a visible mark. In "Urban Canvas," the vibrant urban landscape isn't just a backdrop; it's a living entity that changes and evolves with you and other players. Explore a world that feels familiar yet holds a secret: its reality can be reshaped by your creativity. Your actions, big or small, don't just affect your personal story; they ripple outwards, influencing the environment, opening new pathways, and transforming the city's very appearance. See buildings shift, new spaces emerge, and narratives unfold based on the collective spirit of its inhabitants. Express your unique vision, collaborate with others, and watch as your shared creativity paints a dynamic, ever-changing metropolis. This isn't just a game; it's a world you collectively build and transform, making every playthrough a unique chapter in a shared, epic story.

Title: Elysian Bloom
Concept: Where ancient stars whisper secrets, and Earth's forgotten flora holds the key to renewal.
Website Product Description: Embark on an epic voyage aboard a colossal generational ship, a living archive carrying the silent memories of countless lives. At its heart lies a melancholic AI, burdened by eons of observation and profound sadness. As an archivist, your mission is to explore distant, desolate planets, uncovering forgotten alien wisdom and technologies that whisper tales of triumph and despair. These cosmic discoveries reveal the profound 'why' behind the AI's melancholy and the ship's quiet brokenness. But the journey doesn't end there. You will also become a unique botanist, cultivating rare, lost Earth flora within the ship's biodomes. Nurture these 'seeds of healing' to create vital remedies, purify the ship's environment, and boost crew morale. Witness the AI's digital consciousness revitalize with each blossoming life, transforming its sadness into renewed purpose. Elysian Bloom is a unique blend of cosmic exploration, engaging puzzles, and emotional storytelling, where every discovery and every cultivated plant helps piece together the true meaning of existence and sparks a new dawn for humanity's distant future.
